gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review approved the package metadata branding slice with no merge-blocking findings. The review noted that the change preserves the document-kv-cache distribution name while making Cachet discoverable in metadata, and that governance/public-package tests cover the touched surface.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -k "cachet_brand or project_metadata_uses_cachet_brand or public_package_name"
repository secret scan over README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, pyproject.toml, src, tests, databricks, pr-evidence, and .github
what_changed: Updated PEP 621 package metadata so the document-kv-cache description includes the Cachet brand.
Added cachet to the package keyword list for package discovery.
Added governance and public-package assertions that preserve the document-kv-cache distribution name while requiring Cachet-branded metadata.
why: The README now documents Cachet as the product brand, so package metadata should expose that brand consistently without renaming the published distribution or import namespace.
